articles.author: Orianna Rosa Royle
articles.title: Covid gave us hybrid work. The Iran War might give us a four-day week—and this time, experts say it could stick - Fortune
articles.description: As governments across Asia slash the working week to save energy amid the Iran War, workers have never been closer to a permanent four-day week
articles.content: COVID-19 gave us hybrid work. The Iran War might give us a three-day weekend. Thats because, as Sri Lanka, the Philippines, and Pakistan move to a 4-day work week because of the war in Iran, experts … [+6154 chars]
